name: Vahanna Tech Edge Acquisition I Corp. Warrants
summary: Vahanna Tech Edge Acquisition I Corp. Warrants are warrants to purchase Class A ordinary shares of Vahanna Tech Edge Acquisition I Corp., a blank check company (SPAC). Each whole warrant entitles the holder to purchase one Class A ordinary share at a price of $11.50 per share. Vahanna Tech Edge Acquisition I Corp. is based in New York, USA.
